description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On April 26, 2025 at 2:40 PM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle ("Waymo AV") operating in Santa Monica, California was in a collision 
involving a heavy truck on 17th Court near Pico Boulevard.  
 
The Waymo AV was parked in-lane facing northwest on a narrow portion of 17th Court, with hazard lights activated, when a heavy truck 
traveling southeastbound on 17th Court passed the Waymo AV on the right. As the heavy truck passed by the stationary Waymo AV, the 
passenger side of the heavy truck trailer made contact with the rear passenger side of the Waymo AV. At the time of the impact, the Waymo 
AV's Level 4 ADS was engaged in autonomous mode. The Waymo AV sustained damage.
Print
Clear Form
